---
title: "Mildred Luckett"
---

## Mildred Luckett

**Dates:** (b.Dalston 1871/2)

### Description

schoolmistress

### Biography

Found in the Salisbury Diocesan Training School during the 1891 census, and as a teacher in Knightsbridge, London in 1901.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 2 [1893[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
